nodes.context: Neo-Nazi organization active in the US between September 1983 and December 1984, engaged in robberies and murder.
White supremacist group; some members of The Order II were previously members of Aryan Nations.
White supremacist organization led by William Pierce; received proceeds from The Order's robberies.
White supremacist group led by Frazier Glenn Miller, Jr.; received proceeds from The Order's robberies.
Attempt to perpetuate The Order's activities, active in Idaho in 1986.

edges.context: The Order is affiliated with Aryan Nations according to the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Proceeds from these robberies were distributed to leaders of sympathetic organizations such as William Pierce (National Alliance) and Frazier Glenn Miller, Jr. (White Patriot Party).
edges.context: The Order distributed robbery proceeds to the National Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Proceeds from these robberies were distributed to leaders of sympathetic organizations such as William Pierce (National Alliance) and Frazier Glenn Miller, Jr. (White Patriot Party).
edges.context: The Order distributed robbery proceeds to the White Patriot Party.

edges.evidence_quote: Order II (Bruder Schweigen Strike Force II) was also anti-government and antisemitic.
edges.context: The Order II grew out of the original Order, attempting to perpetuate its activities.
